节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: TreeSet is implemented based on TreeMap. In TreeSet, only value objects are processed. TreeSet can be used to store values, each of which must be unique.

A constructor used to create a TreeSet object. comparator (Optional) User-defined comparison functions. firstValue (required) previous element. secondValue (required) next element. 1.Incorrect parameter types; 2.Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @throws { BusinessError } 10200012 - The TreeSet's constructor cannot be directly invoked.

error_codes.description: The TreeSet's constructor cannot be directly invoked.
Parameter error. Possible causes:

节点.功能描述: Executes a provided function once for each value in the Set object. callbackFn (required) A function that accepts up to three arguments. The function to be called for each element. thisArg (Optional) The value to be used as this value for when callbackFn is called. If thisArg is omitted, undefined is used as the this value. 1.Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2.Incorrect parameter types.
